reviews.comment:
Llegamos 42 personas a las 6 menos 10 de la mañana y el cuerpo de los baños estaba cerrado.  En su lugar había un sucucho con 2 baños y primero dijeron que abrirían los baños grandes a las 6. Cuando se hizo la hora, nos dijeron que iban a abrir a las 8. Sólo 2 empleados y muy lentos. Los lomitos en sandwich estaban muy buenos y frescos

(Translated by Google)
We arrived, 42 of us, at 5:50 a.m. and the main restrooms were closed. Instead, there was a tiny, makeshift place with two toilets, and they initially said the main restrooms would open at 6:00. When that time came, they told us they would open at 8:00. There were only two employees, and they were very slow. The steak sandwiches were very good and fresh.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ3akl2TlNnEAE
